notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-voraussetzung. This branch models voraussetzen only in the precondition or requirement sense, not in the sense of assuming or taking something for granted.

de.definition: Als notwendige Bedingung verlangen oder als vorhanden benoetigen.
de.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von etwas als Bedingung verlangen, nicht annehmen oder stillschweigend erwarten.
examples: Die Aufgabe verlangt bereits sichere Grundkenntnisse.

it.definition: Esigere come condizione necessaria o presupporre come gia presente per poter procedere.
it.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di richiedere come prerequisito, non di supporre mentalmente qualcosa.
examples: Il compito richiede già conoscenze di base sicure.

en.definition: To demand as a necessary condition or to need as already present.
en.usage_note: Only the precondition sense is modeled here, not the sense of assuming something mentally.
examples: The task already calls for solid basic knowledge.

notes: Advanced family expansion around prerequisite and consequence language. This branch models bedingen in the formal sense of entailing or making another development necessary.

de.definition: Zur Folge haben oder so bewirken, dass etwas anderes notwendig wird.
de.usage_note: Hier im eher formellen Sinn von etwas nach sich ziehen oder erforderlich machen.
examples: Der starke Anstieg fuehrt zu zusaetzlichen Massnahmen.

it.definition: Avere come conseguenza qualcosa o rendere necessario un altro sviluppo.
it.usage_note: Qui nel senso piu formale di implicare o rendere necessario.
examples: Il forte aumento rende necessarie misure supplementari.

en.definition: To have something as a consequence or make another step necessary.
en.usage_note: This covers the formal sense of entailing or making something necessary.
examples: The sharp increase makes additional measures necessary.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models zusammenhängen in the abstract sense of being connected or related.

de.definition: Inhaltlich oder ursachlich miteinander verbunden sein.
de.usage_note: Hier nur die abstrakte Verbindung zwischen Fakten, Ereignissen oder Ideen.
examples: Die beiden Zahlen stehen enger miteinander in Verbindung, als es zuerst scheint.

it.definition: Essere connesso a livello di contenuto, causa o significato.
it.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso astratto di fatti, idee o sviluppi che sono legati tra loro.
examples: I due numeri sono più collegati tra loro di quanto sembri all'inizio.

en.definition: To be linked in content, cause, or meaning.
en.usage_note: Only the abstract relation between facts, ideas, or events is modeled here.
examples: The two figures are more closely linked than they first appear.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vorgehen and concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models nachvollziehen only in the abstract sense of following or understanding reasoning, motives, or logic, not in the sense of physically tracing something.

de.definition: Gedanklich verstehen, wie etwas begruendet ist oder warum etwas so geschieht.
de.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von Argumentation, Motivation oder Logik verstehen.
examples: Nach wenigen Minuten wird seine Argumentation fuer alle klar.

it.definition: Capire mentalmente il ragionamento, la logica o il motivo di qualcosa.
it.usage_note: Qui nel senso di riuscire a seguire un'argomentazione o una motivazione.
examples: Dopo pochi minuti, il suo ragionamento diventa chiaro a tutti.

en.definition: To understand the reasoning, logic, or motivation behind something.
en.usage_note: Only the abstract reasoning sense is modeled here, not physical following.
examples: After a few minutes, his line of reasoning becomes clear to everyone.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vorgehen and concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models nachvollziehbar as understandable in terms of reasoning, explanation, or motivation.

de.definition: So erklaert oder begruendet, dass man es gedanklich gut verstehen kann.
de.usage_note: Typisch fuer Entscheidungen, Argumente, Vorgehen oder Reaktionen.
examples: Seine Entscheidung wirkt nach der Erklaerung fuer alle verstaendlich.

it.definition: Spiegato o motivato in modo tale da poter essere capito bene.
it.usage_note: Tipico per decisioni, argomenti, procedure o reazioni.
examples: Dopo la spiegazione, la sua decisione appare chiara a tutti.

en.definition: Explained or motivated in a way that can be followed and understood well.
en.usage_note: Typical for decisions, arguments, procedures, or reactions.
examples: After the explanation, his decision seems clear to everyone.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-herausforderung. This branch models herausfordern in the sense of demanding a strong response, effort, or ability from a person, team, or system.

de.definition: Von jemandem oder etwas viel Einsatz, Faehigkeit oder eine starke Reaktion verlangen.
de.usage_note: Hier im Sinn von fordern oder stark beanspruchen, nicht im engen Sinn einer formellen Herausforderung zum Duell.
examples: Die neue Rolle verlangt dem ganzen Team sehr viel ab.

it.definition: Richiedere molto impegno, capacità o una forte reazione a qualcuno o qualcosa.
it.usage_note: Qui nel senso ampio di mettere alla prova, non solo di lanciare una sfida formale.
examples: Il nuovo ruolo mette davvero alla prova tutto il team.

en.definition: To demand a lot of effort, ability, or response from someone or something.
en.usage_note: This covers the broader sense of testing or demanding a lot, not only a formal challenge.
examples: The new role demands a great deal from the whole team.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-herausforderung. This branch models herausfordernd in the sense of being demanding, difficult, and requiring real effort.

de.definition: Schwierig und anspruchsvoll, sodass echter Einsatz noetig ist.
de.usage_note: Kann fuer Aufgaben, Situationen, Phasen oder Ziele verwendet werden.
examples: Der Kurs ist schwer, aber gerade deshalb besonders interessant.

it.definition: Difficile e richiedente, tanto da domandare un vero impegno.
it.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a compiti, situazioni, periodi o obiettivi.
examples: Il corso è difficile, ma proprio per questo molto interessante.

en.definition: Difficult and demanding in a way that requires real effort.
en.usage_note: This can describe tasks, situations, phases, or goals.
examples: The course is difficult, but that is exactly what makes it interesting.

notes: Advanced communication expansion. This branch models Missverständnis as a misunderstanding caused by different interpretations, incomplete information, or unclear wording.

de.definition: Eine Situation, in der Menschen etwas unterschiedlich verstehen und dadurch ein falsches Bild entsteht.
de.usage_note: Typisch bei unklarer Formulierung, fehlendem Kontext oder unterschiedlichen Erwartungen.
examples: Nach der Nachricht dachten beide Seiten zuerst an ganz verschiedene Dinge.

it.definition: Una situazione in cui persone diverse capiscono la stessa cosa in modi differenti e nasce un'idea sbagliata.
it.usage_note: Tipico quando mancano contesto o chiarezza.
examples: Dopo il messaggio, le due parti avevano inizialmente idee del tutto diverse.

en.definition: A situation in which people understand something differently and a wrong impression results.
en.usage_note: Typical when wording is unclear, context is missing, or expectations differ.
examples: After the message, the two sides first had completely different ideas in mind.

notes: Advanced communication expansion. This branch models missverstehen in the sense of understanding a message, intention, or situation incorrectly.

de.definition: Etwas falsch verstehen oder einer Aussage, Person oder Situation einen unzutreffenden Sinn geben.
de.usage_note: Hier geht es um inhaltliches Fehlverstehen, nicht um blosses Ueberhoeren.
examples: Ohne den ganzen Satz deutet man die Aussage schnell falsch.

it.definition: Capire in modo sbagliato il senso di una frase, di un'intenzione o di una situazione.
it.usage_note: Qui nel senso di interpretare male, non semplicemente di non sentire bene.
examples: Senza la frase completa, si interpreta facilmente male il senso.

en.definition: To understand the meaning of a message, intention, or situation incorrectly.
en.usage_note: This covers interpreting something wrongly, not merely failing to hear it.
examples: Without the full sentence, the meaning is easy to interpret wrongly.

notes: Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-eindruck. This branch models beeindrucken in the sense of making a strong positive impression through quality, ability, presence, or result.

de.definition: Bei jemandem durch Qualitaet, Faehigkeit, Auftreten oder Leistung einen starken positiven Eindruck hinterlassen.
de.usage_note: Hier geht es um einen spuerbaren positiven Eindruck, nicht um blosses Gefallen oder Zustimmung.
examples: Seine ruhige und sichere Praesentation laesst viele im Raum staunen.

it.definition: Lasciare una forte impressione positiva grazie a qualità, capacità, presenza o risultati.
it.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di fare impressione in positivo, non nel senso fisico di colpire.
examples: La sua presentazione calma e sicura colpisce molte persone nella sala.

en.definition: To leave a strong positive impression through quality, ability, presence, or results.
en.usage_note: This covers making a noticeable positive impression, not simply being liked.
examples: His calm and confident presentation makes many people in the room take notice.
